hooks.command: staged=$(git diff --cached --name-only | grep -E 'kts?$'); if [ -n "$staged" ]; then (cd backend && ./gradlew ktlintFormat -q >/dev/null 2>&1); echo "$staged" | xargs git add; fi; true
file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.kt$' && cd backend && ./gradlew compileKotlin 2>&1 | tail -10 || true
file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.ts$' && [ -d frontend ] && cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -10 || true
jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -qE 'gradlew test|npm test' && echo '{"systemMessage":"Test suite finished."}' || true

branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); echo "$branch" | grep -qE '^STORY-[0-9]+' && printf '{"systemMessage":"Branch %s — remember to run the full test suite before marking the PR ready."}\n' "$branch" || echo '{}'
